title: eleusine lima
intro: Eleusine lima, also known as Finger Millet, is a type of small-grained cereal crop native to Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Finger Millet include lowering blood sugar levels, improving digestion, and providing essential nutrients such as iron, calcium, and potassium. Finger Millet can be consumed as a whole grain, flour, or herbal preparation, and is often used in traditional remedies in the form of tea, decoctions, or infusions.
